label: Business Analyst
comment: Gathers requirements and translates business needs into technical solutions.

label: Customer Support Specialist
comment: Assists users with issues and provides product support.

label: Data Scientist
comment: Analyzes data to extract insights and support decision-making.

label: DevOps Engineer
comment: Manages deployment pipelines and infrastructure automation.

label: Finance Officer
comment: Manages budgets, expenses, and financial reporting.

label: HR Manager
comment: Handles recruitment, onboarding, and employee relations.

label: Marketing Specialist
comment: Develops marketing strategies and manages campaigns.

label: Product Owner
comment: Defines product vision and prioritizes features for development.

label: Project Manager
comment: Oversees project timelines, deliverables, and team coordination.

label: Quality Assurance Analyst
comment: Tests software to ensure quality and identify bugs.

label: Scrum Master
comment: Facilitates agile ceremonies and removes team impediments.

label: Software Engineer
comment: Develops and maintains software applications and systems.

label: System Administrator
comment: Maintains servers, networks, and IT infrastructure.

label: Technical Writer
comment: Creates and maintains technical documentation and user guides.

label: UI/UX Designer
comment: Designs user interfaces and ensures a positive user experience.
